# Because Busy — Brand Guidelines & Design System

> Complete brand guidelines and design system documentation for Because You Are Busy (BYAB), an operations, transformation, and growth consultancy serving founders and managing partners since 2005. This document contains all visual identity specifications, design tokens, component specifications, and usage guidelines.

## Table of Contents

1. Brand Overview
2. Logo Guidelines
3. Color System
4. Typography System
5. Spacing System
6. Component Library
7. Design Principles
8. Accessibility Standards
9. Design Tokens Reference

---

## 1. Brand Overview

Because You Are Busy (BYAB) is an operations, transformation, and growth consultancy founded in 2005. The brand identity reflects a clean, professional, and authoritative design language — pure grayscale from black to white — communicating structure, clarity, and trust.

### Brand Attributes
- Tone: Authoritative, direct, confident
- Energy: Measured, professional
- Target Audience: Founders, managing partners, law firm partners, B2B leaders
- Design Framework: Tailwind CSS
- Color Scheme: Pure grayscale, light mode primary

### Quick Reference
- Font Family: Inter
- Base Spacing Unit: 8px
- Default Border Radius: 8px
- Color Scheme: Light (pure grayscale)

---

## 2. Logo Guidelines

The Because Busy logo is the cornerstone of the brand identity. It must be used consistently across all touchpoints.

### Logo Specifications
- Primary format: SVG wordmark
- Minimum width: 48px for digital applications
- Clear space: 2x the logomark height on all sides
- File formats: SVG (web), PNG (social media and print)

### Approved Variations
- Standard: Dark logomark on light backgrounds
- Inverted: Light/white logomark on dark backgrounds (#000000 or darker)

### Usage Rules — Do
- Maintain original proportions at all times
- Use only approved color variations
- Ensure adequate contrast against backgrounds
- Keep minimum clear space around the logo

### Usage Rules — Don't
- Do not stretch or distort the logo
- Do not add drop shadows, glows, or other effects
- Do not place on busy or low-contrast backgrounds
- Do not rotate, skew, or tilt the logo
- Do not alter the logo colors outside approved variations
- Do not add outlines or strokes to the logo

---

## 3. Color System

The color palette is designed to be clean, professional, and accessible. Each color has a specific purpose within the design system.

### Brand Colors

#### Primary (#999999)
- HSL: 0, 0%, 60%
- Usage: Primary brand color for large surface areas, section backgrounds, and decorative elements
- Contrast on white: Decorative use only (does not meet text contrast requirements on white)

#### Accent (#000000)
- HSL: 0, 0%, 0%
- Usage: Primary CTAs, important text, interactive elements, headings
- Contrast on white: AAA (21:1 ratio)

#### Background (#FFFFFF)
- HSL: 0, 0%, 100%
- Usage: Page backgrounds and primary content areas

#### Text Primary (#000000)
- HSL: 0, 0%, 0%
- Usage: Main body text, headings, and all primary readable content
- Contrast on white: AAA (21:1 ratio)

#### Link (#666666)
- HSL: 0, 0%, 40%
- Usage: Clickable elements, secondary labels, navigation items, supporting text
- Contrast on white: AA (5.74:1 ratio)

### Extended Palette — Grayscale

| Token    | Hex     | Usage                                    |
|----------|---------|------------------------------------------|
| Gray 50  | #F5F5F5 | Subtle backgrounds, card surfaces        |
| Gray 100 | #E5E5E5 | Borders, dividers, input backgrounds     |
| Gray 200 | #CCCCCC | Heavier borders, disabled states         |
| Gray 300 | #999999 | Primary brand color, decorative fills    |
| Gray 400 | #777777 | Placeholder text, disabled text          |
| Gray 500 | #666666 | Secondary text, links, captions          |
| Gray 600 | #444444 | Body text alternative, icons             |
| Gray 700 | #333333 | Dark UI elements, emphasis               |
| Gray 800 | #1A1A1A | Near-black surfaces                      |
| Gray 900 | #000000 | Buttons, headings, maximum contrast      |

### Accessibility Compliance
- Accent (#000000) on White (#FFFFFF): AAA — 21:1 contrast ratio
- Link (#666666) on White (#FFFFFF): AA — 5.74:1 contrast ratio
- Text (#000000) on Primary (#999999): AA — 5.32:1 contrast ratio

---

## 4. Typography System

Inter is the primary typeface, providing excellent readability and a modern aesthetic across all sizes and weights.

### Typefaces

#### Primary — Inter
- Role: Body text and headings
- Weights: 400 (Regular), 500 (Medium), 600 (Semibold), 700 (Bold)
- Source: Google Fonts
- Stack: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif

#### Monospace — JetBrains Mono
- Role: Code blocks, technical values, data
- Weights: 400 (Regular), 500 (Medium), 700 (Bold)
- Source: Google Fonts
- Stack: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace

### Type Scale

| Name        | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Usage                        |
|-------------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|------------------------------|
| Display     | 64px | 600    | 1.1         | -0.02em        | Hero headings, landing pages |
| Heading 1   | 48px | 600    | 1.15        | -0.02em        | Page titles                  |
| Heading 2   | 36px | 600    | 1.2         | -0.015em       | Section headings             |
| Heading 3   | 28px | 600    | 1.25        | -0.01em        | Subsection headings          |
| Heading 4   | 22px | 600    | 1.3         | -0.005em       | Card titles, labels          |
| Body Large  | 18px | 400    | 1.6         | 0em            | Lead paragraphs, intros      |
| Body        | 16px | 400    | 1.6         | 0em            | Standard body text           |
| Body Small  | 14px | 400    | 1.5         | 0em            | Secondary information        |
| Caption     | 12px | 500    | 1.4         | 0.02em         | Labels, metadata, timestamps |

### Font Weight Usage
- Regular (400): Body text, descriptions, paragraphs
- Medium (500): Labels, captions, navigation items
- Semibold (600): Headings, titles, emphasis
- Bold (700): Display headings, key metrics

---

## 5. Spacing System

All spacing is based on an 8px grid, providing consistent rhythm and alignment.

### Scale

| Token | Value | Multiplier | Usage                             |
|-------|-------|------------|-----------------------------------|
| 2xs   | 4px   | 0.5x       | Tight gaps, icon padding          |
| xs    | 8px   | 1x         | Base unit, inline spacing         |
| sm    | 12px  | 1.5x       | Small component padding           |
| md    | 16px  | 2x         | Standard padding, gaps            |
| lg    | 24px  | 3x         | Card padding, section gaps        |
| xl    | 32px  | 4x         | Section padding                   |
| 2xl   | 48px  | 6x         | Large section gaps                |
| 3xl   | 64px  | 8x         | Page section spacing              |
| 4xl   | 96px  | 12x        | Hero spacing, major separations   |

### Usage Guidelines
- Padding: 16px for compact elements, 24px for cards, 32-48px for page sections
- Gap: 8px between tightly related elements, 16px between grouped items, 24-32px between sections
- Border Radius: 8px default, 10px for buttons, 6px for small elements, 12-16px for cards

---

## 6. Component Library

### Buttons

#### Primary Button
- Background: #000000
- Text color: #FFFFFF
- Border: 1px solid #666666
- Border radius: 10px
- Padding: 10px 20px
- Font: 14px / Medium (500)
- States: Default, Hover (lighten), Active (darken), Disabled (50% opacity)

#### Secondary Button
- Background: #F5F5F5
- Text color: #000000
- Border: 1px solid border color
- Border radius: 0px (sharp corners)
- Padding: 10px 20px
- Font: 14px / Medium (500)
- States: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled (50% opacity)

### Input Fields
- Height: 40px
- Padding: 0 16px
- Border radius: 8px
- Border: 1px solid border color
- Background: white
- Font: 14px / Regular
- Focus: 2px ring with ring color at 20% opacity
- States: Default, Focus, Disabled (muted background), Error (red border)

### Cards
- Default Card: Subtle background (#F5F5F5), light border, 8px radius
- Elevated Card: White background, subtle shadow, 8px radius
- Dark Card: Dark background (#000000), light text (#FFFFFF), 8px radius

---

## 7. Design Principles

### 1. Hierarchy
Use size, weight, and color to create clear visual hierarchy. Headings should use semibold (600) weight and body text regular (400). Use muted foreground colors for secondary information.

### 2. Consistency
Stick to the spacing scale and never use arbitrary values. All spacing should be multiples of 8px. Maintain consistent padding and gaps throughout the interface.

### 3. Restraint
Less is more. Avoid unnecessary decoration, shadows, or color. Let content breathe with generous whitespace. Every element should serve a clear purpose.

### 4. Accessibility
All text must meet WCAG AA contrast requirements. Interactive elements need visible focus states. Use semantic HTML and proper ARIA labels for screen readers.

---

## 8. Accessibility Standards

- All text meets WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements minimum
- Primary text (#000000) on white achieves AAA (21:1)
- Link text (#666666) on white achieves AA (5.74:1)
- Interactive elements have visible focus indicators
- All images require descriptive alt text
- Semantic HTML structure with proper heading hierarchy
- Keyboard navigation support for all interactive elements

---

## 9. Design Tokens Reference

```css
/* Colors */
--color-primary: #999999;
--color-accent: #000000;
--color-background: #FFFFFF;
--color-text: #000000;
--color-link: #666666;

/* Typography */
--font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

/* Spacing */
--space-unit: 8px;
--radius: 8px;
--radius-button: 10px;

/* Shadows */
--shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
--shadow-md: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
```

---
